description: DOM mapping backlog — fields that need live Kaizen DOM inspection to get their element IDs

priority_tiers.P0: High-value WPBAs used weekly — CBD, DOPS, LAT
priority_tiers.P1: Frequently used WPBAs — MINI_CEX, MSF, QIAT, SDL
priority_tiers.P2: Other forms with gaps — TEACH_OBS, RESEARCH, AUDIT, ABSENCE, HIGHER_PROG, OOP

inspection_script: backend/inspect_p0_fields.py — run with KAIZEN_USERNAME + KAIZEN_PASSWORD to auto-discover P0 field IDs

backlog.evidence_needed: DOM element ID from live Kaizen CBD form
backlog.next_action: Run inspect_p0_fields.py OR manually inspect CBD form DOM for select/ng-model with label 'Clinical Setting'
backlog.note: MINI_CEX uses f091f9c5-..., ACAT uses e1ae9b5b-... — cannot assume shared UUID, must inspect CBD specifically
